Reason the 6am email from 'Oracle leadership' told thousands of laid-off employees
description: Oracle has begun its largest-ever round of layoffs, with employees receiving termination emails from "Oracle Leadership" at 6AM saying their roles had been eliminated after "careful consideration of Oracle's current business needs." Around 10,000 employees have reportedly been cut so far, with estimates suggesting the total could reach 30,000. The email gave employees a narrow window to act before systems were deactivated.

Fish, deeply ingrained in Bengali life, now represents pride and a defense against perceived cultural invasion.

description: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff is pushing back on the narrative that AI is driving mass white-collar layoffs, calling it an oversimplification—and in some cases, a CEO's "lazy way out." While companies like Block and Atlassian have framed sweeping cuts as AI-driven restructuring, Benioff argues they're conflating three very different problems. At Salesforce, he's doing the opposite: hiring 20% more salespeople, convinced that human connection is something no AI can replicate.

'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 16: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 950 crore
description: In just 16 days, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has rewritten box office history, amassing a staggering Rs. 939.46 crore India net. The Aditya Dhar directorial, starring Ranveer Singh as the elite spy Hamza, has officially overtaken the lifetime collections of its predecessor in a mere 11 days. Despite the massive IPL 2026 season, the film continues to dominate theaters, crossing a global gross of Rs. 1,492.17 crore and becoming the highest-grossing Indian film of all time in North America. With powerful performances from Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Rampal, and Rakesh Bedi, this high-stakes espionage thriller is now rapidly closing in on the historic Rs. 1,000 crore India net milestone.

This highly anticipated fan event promises candid conversations between two iconic figures.

title: Why Amazon needs to talk to Apple as it looks to buy $9b satellite group Globalstar
description: Amazon is reportedly in talks to acquire Globalstar, a move that would significantly boost its low Earth orbit satellite ambitions. A key hurdle involves Apple's 20% stake in Globalstar, necessitating negotiations with the tech giant. This potential deal could accelerate Amazon's competition with SpaceX's Starlink and enhance its own satellite internet capabilities.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry join $150b mogul in heartwarming move
description: Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have joined Warren Buffett in reviving his iconic charity lunch through a new auction titled “A Seat At The Table.” The initiative blends Buffett’s legacy in philanthropy with the Currys’ growing influence beyond basketball. With proceeds benefiting the Glide Foundation and Eat. Learn. Play. Foundation, the event aims to create meaningful change in underserved communities. Scheduled for June 24 in Omaha, the auction reflects a powerful collaboration focused on impact, purpose, and long-term community support.
